const MODEL = "@cf/moondream/moondream3.1-9B-A2B";
const APP_B64 = "";

export default {
  async fetch(request, env) {
    const url = new URL(request.url);
    if (request.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/") return htmlResponse(APP_B64);
    if (request.method === "POST" && url.pathname === "/api/recognize") return recognize(request, env);
    return new Response("Not Found", { status: 404 });
  }
};

function htmlResponse(encoded) {
  const bytes = Uint8Array.from(atob(encoded), c => c.charCodeAt(0));
  return new Response(bytes, {headers: {"content-type":"text/html; charset=utf-8","cache-control":"no-store","x-content-type-options":"nosniff","referrer-policy":"no-referrer"}});
}

async function recognize(request, env) {
  if (!env.AI) return Response.json({error:'Workers AIバインディング「AI」が設定されていません。'},{status:500});
  let body;try{body=await request.json()}catch{return Response.json({error:'画像データを読み取れませんでした。'},{status:400})}
  const image=String(body?.image||''),count=Math.max(1,Math.min(8,Number(body?.count)||1)),mode=body?.mode==='single'?'single':'batch';
  if(!/^data:image\/(?:png|jpeg|webp);base64,/i.test(image))return Response.json({error:'画像形式が不正です。'},{status:400});
  if(image.length>5_500_000)return Response.json({error:'解析画像が大きすぎます。'},{status:413});
  const question=mode==='single' ? singlePrompt() : batchPrompt(count);
  try{
    const result=await env.AI.run(MODEL,{task:'query',image,question,reasoning:false,temperature:0,max_tokens:Math.max(220,count*90),stream:false});
    const raw=String(result?.answer||'').trim();
    const items=parseItems(raw,count);
    return Response.json({items,raw,model:MODEL});
  }catch(error){console.error(error);return Response.json({error:'視覚AIの解析に失敗しました。',detail:String(error?.message||error)},{status:500})}
}

function singlePrompt() {return [
  'This image is one factor row from the Japanese game Uma Musume Pretty Derby.',
  'Read only the brown factor name. Ignore icons, stars, borders and numbers.',
  'Do not translate. Preserve Japanese, Latin letters, spaces, hyphens and the circle symbol ○ exactly.',
  'Return exactly one compact JSON object: {"items":[{"index":1,"name":"...","candidates":["..."],"confidence":0}]}.',
  'confidence is an integer 0-100. candidates contains at most 3 exact readings. No explanation.'
].join('\n')}
function batchPrompt(count) {return [
  `This image contains exactly ${count} numbered rows from the Japanese game Uma Musume Pretty Derby.`,
  'Each row has a black index number at the far left and one factor row image to its right.',
  'For every numbered row, read only the brown factor name. Ignore icons, stars, borders and the black index number.',
  'Do not translate. Preserve Japanese, Latin letters, spaces, hyphens and the circle symbol ○ exactly.',
  `Return exactly one compact JSON object with exactly ${count} items: {"items":[{"index":1,"name":"...","candidates":["..."],"confidence":0}]}.`,
  `Indexes must be 1 through ${count} with no omissions. confidence is 0-100. candidates has at most 3 exact readings. No explanation.`
].join('\n')}

function parseItems(answer,count) {
  const clean=answer.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i,'').replace(/\s*```$/i,'').trim();let value=null;
  const start=clean.indexOf('{'),end=clean.lastIndexOf('}');if(start>=0&&end>start){try{value=JSON.parse(clean.slice(start,end+1))}catch{}}
  let arr=Array.isArray(value?.items)?value.items:Array.isArray(value)?value:[];
  if(!arr.length&&count===1)arr=[{index:1,name:clean,candidates:[],confidence:55}];
  const by=new Map();for(const x of arr){const index=Math.max(1,Math.min(count,Number(x?.index)||0));if(!index)continue;const name=sanitize(x?.name),candidates=[...new Set([name,...(Array.isArray(x?.candidates)?x.candidates:[])].map(sanitize).filter(Boolean))].slice(0,3);by.set(index,{index,name,candidates,confidence:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(Number(x?.confidence)||0)))})}
  return Array.from({length:count},(_,i)=>by.get(i+1)||{index:i+1,name:'',candidates:[],confidence:0});
}
function sanitize(v){return String(v||'').replace(/^['"`「『]+|['"`」』]+$/g,'').replace(/^(name|factor)\s*[:：]\s*/i,'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().slice(0,80)}
